basic_details.job_title: Digital India Corporation State Coordinator Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Digital India Corporation (DIC) State Coordinator Notification 2026 has been released on 27 April 2026 on the official website of Digital India Corporation. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the DIC State Coordinator Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 20 years Maximum Age: 40 years Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.details: MA Economics, MA Political Science or Any Graduate with relevant years of experience. Experience: 0-5 Years

selection_process: Screening of applications based on qualifications
academic record and relevant experience Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the Digital India Corporation State Coordinator Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 10-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Digital India Corporation to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the State Coordinator post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the State Coordinator position is 10 May 2026. Ensure all details are accurate before the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the State Coordinator role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's degree in Economics or Political Science, or be any graduate with relevant years of experience to be eligible for this post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the State Coordinator position?
faq.answer: The age limit for the State Coordinator post is between 20 years (minimum) and 40 years (maximum). Age relaxation may apply as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the State Coordinator post?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the State Coordinator position announced by Digital India Corporation.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the State Coordinator recruitment is entirely online. Candidates need to apply through the official website or the provided link.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the State Coordinator role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves an initial screening of applications based on qualifications, age, academic record, and relevant experience, followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for the State Coordinator position?
faq.answer: The State Coordinator position is offered on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q9. Which state is this recruitment for?
faq.answer: This recruitment is specifically for candidates applying for the State Coordinator position in Telangana.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section of this article. It contains all the detailed information about the recruitment.
